summary: CI/CD Hardening VERIFIED: All hard gates in place. Backend ruff lint passes (exit 0), Frontend ESLint passes (exit 0), Deploy pipeline passes 6/6 gates (ALL_GATES_PASSED), GitHub Actions YAML files properly configured with hard gates, Login flow works, Frontend loads correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ci-cd.yml: backend-lint uses 'ruff check .' with pyproject.toml config (not hardcoded file list) - CORRECT
ci-cd.yml: backend-test uses curated test suite (10 specific test paths) without || true - CORRECT
ci-cd.yml: frontend-lint runs 'npx eslint src/ --quiet' as hard gate - CORRECT
ci-cd.yml: security-scan has || true only in grep patterns for secret scanning (intentional - grep returns 1 when no matches) - ACCEPTABLE
deploy.yml: All deploy steps have 'exit 1' placeholders instead of silent dry-run echo - CORRECT
eslint.config.js: Valid ESLint v9 flat config with 3 config objects - CORRECT
pyproject.toml: Has _legacy/ in ruff exclude list - CORRECT

success_rate.backend: 100% - ruff check passes, 304 unit tests pass in pipeline
success_rate.frontend: 100% - ESLint passes, app loads and login works

context_for_next_testing_agent: CI/CD hardening complete. Key verifications: (1) ruff check . exits 0, (2) npx eslint src/ --quiet exits 0, (3) POST /api/deploy/pipeline/run-all returns 6/6 gates passed with verdict ALL_GATES_PASSED, (4) ci-cd.yml has no || true in test/lint steps (only in grep patterns for secret scanning which is intentional), (5) deploy.yml has exit 1 in placeholder deploy steps.

frontend_lint.result: No output (exit 0) - all lint errors fixed
